title: sweech proxy — fallback-routing reverse proxy
description: The whole point of having 18 third-party workspaces is graceful degradation, yet nothing degrades automatically. Build a local Anthropic+OpenAI-compatible reverse proxy that re-targets on 429/limit_reached using the smart score and a per-chain fallback order.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 2: "Auto-fallback routing. With 18 third-party workspaces configured, the whole point is graceful degradation — and nothing degrades automatically"

acceptanceCriteria:
sweech proxy start --port

--chain binds a local HTTP server speaking Anthropic + OpenAI Messages format
On 429 / limit_reached / org_disabled, the next workspace in the chain is tried
Each request emits a structured log line: chosen workspace, fallback hops, final status
Lives on the existing daemon process (extends /run), not a second daemon
Daemon auth from T-039 also protects this endpoint
